name: Citi® Secured Mastercard®

welcome_offer.description: No welcome offer; designed for credit building

earning_rates.notes: 1 point per $1 spent; points can be redeemed for cash credit

other_benefits.name: Credit Bureau Reporting
other_benefits.description: Reports to all three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)

other_benefits.name: Security Deposit
other_benefits.description: Refundable deposit required: $200 minimum, $2,500 maximum. Deposit equals your credit limit.

other_benefits.name: Graduation Program
other_benefits.description: May graduate to an unsecured Citi card after about 18 months of on-time payments

notes: No rewards focus. Security deposit is fully refundable when account is closed. Max credit limit $2,500. Average credit limit around $1,000-$2,706 per Credit Karma data.
